items.name_en: 🚩🚩🚩Diamond-encrusted Channel is the most heart-fluttering bag🤩🤩 You deserve it II This style is not common, so it's very popular! Let's talk about this bag: The leather is high quality and feels incredibly comfortable to the touch. The hardware work is superb!!! The capacity is not large, but it is mini, able to hold simple shopping essentials. In short, this bag is stylish yet refined, and it goes well with dresses 👗 You got this.

items.name_en: ￼ 【Oil Wax Leather】
items.name_cn:
￼ 【Oil Wax Leather】
PRADA Retro New Rise Three-in-One
Recreating the iconic style of 2005. Condensing Prada's design codes into a refined, versatile silhouette, creating a dialogue between past and present styles. Adjustable shoulder strap, metal hardware, detachable key ring, a refined and simple leather piece. The enamel metal triangle logo exudes the iconic charm of the design.
Retro and free-spirited, bold and avant-garde with a rock vibe
1BH209 Size/22×18×6

0 Leather Large
DIOR book tote 24 Early Spring New
I have to say, Dior really knows how to play.
The tote you can carry is here! Simply amazing.
A viral hit derived from the most classic tote.
More and more people love big bags; it's truly unisex.
Whether handheld or crossbody, commuting, gym, or business trips are effortless.
Structured and doesn't collapse; I wish I could carry it every day.
Big bag lovers can buy this with your eyes closed!!

Model 8833

Flat yet textured
With curved metal design
Fashionable and elegant 😍 Every compartment will imprint your story

Under simplicity, luxury and elegance are fully revealed
Style No.: 730968
Dimensions: 28*10*24

items.name_en: 2022 Spring New Small Nylon Shoulder Bag 1BD313 🎉🎉🎉 Prada's mix-and-match philosophy runs through its narrative language, interpreting creative designs through unique combinations of materials, silhouettes, and functions. This flap shoulder bag reinterprets the innovative Re-Nylon material, presenting a delicate and feminine silhouette. The lining process gives the bag a soft and modern look, and the adjustable leather shoulder strap allows for multiple carrying methods. Dimensions: Height 16cm * Length 11cm * Width 23cm
items.name_cn: 2022 Spring New Small Nylon Shoulder Bag 1BD313 🎉🎉🎉 Prada's mix-and-match philosophy runs through its narrative language, interpreting creative designs through unique combinations of materials, silhouettes, and functions. This flap shoulder bag reinterprets the innovative Re-Nylon material, presenting a delicate and feminine silhouette. The lining process gives the bag a soft and modern look, and the adjustable leather shoulder strap allows for multiple carrying methods. Dimensions: Height 16cm * Length 11cm * Width 23cm
